title: Traditional Dutch Stamppot
description: A hearty Dutch dish made with boiled kale, potatoes, and sausage. Often served with a pat of butter and a dollop of mustard.
instructions: Bring a large pot of salted water to a boil.
Boil the kale until tender, about 5 minutes.
Boil the potatoes until tender, about 15-20 minutes.
Pan-fry the sausage in a skillet until browned, about 5-7 minutes.
Drain the kale and potatoes, then chop the potatoes into small pieces.
Add the chopped potatoes to the skillet with the sausage and stir to combine.
Serve the stamppot hot, topped with a pat of butter and a dollop of sour cream and mustard.
